search_candidates.title: Investor Relations - Reports & Governance - DCI Indonesia
search_candidates.content: # Investor Relations. ## Welcome to DCI Indonesia’s Investor Relations Portal. Gain seamless access to in-depth resources on our corporate governance framework, financial performance, and the latest strategic developments—all in one centralized hub. Guided by our commitment to integrity and operational excellence, we strive to deliver transparency, reliability, and sustainable value for our shareholders and stakeholders alike. At DCI Indonesia, we uphold the highest standards of corporate governance to ensure integrity, transparency, and accountability across all operations. This section provides clear and accessible information on our leadership structure, governance policies, and ethical practices. ## Reports. Explore our annual, quarterly, and sustainability reports for in-depth insights into DCI Indonesia’s performance and strategic direction. Find the latest official announcements from DCI Indonesia, including corporate actions, project updates, and dividend information. ## Latest Reports. search_candidates.title: DCII Investor Relations - DCI Indonesia Tbk PT - Alpha Spread
search_candidates.content: DCI Indonesia Tbk PT Logo. # DCI Indonesia Tbk PT IDX:DCII. ## DCI Indonesia Tbk PT Investor Relations. PT DCI Indonesia Tbk is an Indonesian data center company. The company makes money mainly by charging customers for colocation and related hosting services in its data centers. DCI’s business model is different from a typical software company because it sits at the physical backbone of the internet and enterprise IT in Indonesia. It is closer to a utility-like infrastructure provider: once a customer places critical systems inside a data center, reliability, security, and location matter a lot, which can make the relationship sticky. The information on this site, and in its related newsletters, is not intended to be, nor does it constitute, investment advice or recommendations. Stock intrinsic value is the real worth of a company's stock, based on its financial health and performance. By focusing on the company's actual financial strength, like its earnings and debts, we can make better decisions about which stocks to buy and when.

search_candidates.query: DCII DCI Indonesia Tbk. annual report 2025 pdf official
search_candidates.title: DCII profit surges 193.39% in the first quarter of 2025 | IDNFinancials
search_candidates.content: ## DCII profit surges 193.39% in the first quarter of 2025. JAKARTA – PT DCI Indonesia Tbk (DCII), a data centre operator owned by Otto Toto Sugiri, reported a net profit of IDR 418.84 billion in the first quarter (Q1) of 2025, up 193.39% year-on-year (yoy) from IDR 142.60 billion in the same period last year. According to its latest financial report, the profit increase aligns with a revenue growth of 118.26%, reaching IDR 773.55 billion, compared with IDR 354.41 billion in the same period of 2024. The colocation segment remained the main contributor to DCII’s revenue, generating IDR 733 billion or 94.8% of the total revenue in Q1 2025. The number of clients contributing over 10% to total revenue rose to three companies, up from two previously. This marked the company’s all-time high (ATH) since its listing on the Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) in January 2021. ## Latest News. ## Popular News.
